stemHtml: According to ICAO, what is correct about the Fatigue Risk Management System (FRMS)?

options.a: FRMS is a data-driven means of continuously monitoring and managing fatigue-related safety risks and can be different for every employer.
options.b: FRMS comprises a set of rules implemented by ICAO to prevent crew fatigue and ensure that relevant personnel are performing at adequate levels of alertness.
options.c: FRMS does not relieve an operator from complying with the country’s operational requirements concerning flight duty and rest periods.
options.d: Operators from ICAO member states are obliged to install a FRMS, based upon scientific principles and knowledge as well as their individual operational experience.
